sourceRef.citation: Asma Khalid,Dr. Naveed Azmat, Nafeesa Rani et al. 2026

statement.en: ETHICAL CONSIDERATIONS AND POLICY FRAMEWORKS FOR TEACHING WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IN SECONDARY SCHOOL SETTINGS

proposer: Asma Khalid,Dr. Naveed Azmat, Nafeesa Rani

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a policy/ethics framework paper (2026 preprint) addressing emerging AI-in-education practices. It is neither empirically proven nor refuted; it represents provisional guidance under active development as AI pedagogy itself evolves. The axioms are normative (what *should* be done) rather than descriptive (what *is* true), placing them in FLOWING status pending validation through implementation and longitudinal study.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 力を持つ者ほど透明性を失い、信頼だけが知恵へ導く道である。
